title: Stargate Train Compat
description: A small mod that makes Create trains go through stargates from Stargate Journey mod.
body:
This is a small mod that allows trains from the Create mod to pass through the stargates from the Stargate Journey mod. All you have to do is to place the train tracks in front of the gates through which the train will pass.

![The correct setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf143c9612b3008f9bf31e9d3a836efdef25b364.png)

This mod has a limitation. Trains can't pass throuhg a wormhole that leads to the same dimension.
